MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

David Walter Washington, Esq., appearing for Place 2 Park, Appellant/Defendant, The owner, Mr. Menta is also present

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. The parties were sworn and both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.
